channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Migration trends and economic shifts in South Africa
item.description: New analysis highlights how South Africa's migration patterns are transforming its economy, influencing business strategies, talent retention, and consumer markets. The report by Eighty20 identifies t...

item.title: Homeowners and Local Authorities Clash Over Perimeter Walls and Road Maintenance
item.description: Residents in prime areas are facing growing frustration over the construction of perimeter walls around residential properties and the blocking of roads, raising concerns about access and urban planni...

item.title: Tanker Traffic in the Strait of Hormuz Shows Signs of Recovery After Unexplained U-Turns
item.description: Oil and gas shipping through the Strait of Hormuz, a critical U.S.-protected energy corridor, has shown signs of recovery after a series of unexplained U-turns and detours by vessels. Observers report...

item.title: General Motors Advocates for CUSMA Renewal to Sustain North American Auto Industry
item.description: General Motors Canada president Jack Uppal emphasized the critical importance of renewing the Canada-United States-Mexico Agreement (CUSMA) to maintain the integration of the North American auto indus...

item.title: Meta Tests Pocket, an AI App for Creating, Sharing, and Remixing Interactive Mini Apps
item.description: Meta is reportedly testing a new application called Pocket that focuses on AI-assisted creation of small interactive experiences, informally referred to as 'gizmos.' Although the company has not offic...

item.title: Nigerian goalkeeper appears at F1 event
item.description: Super Eagles goalkeeper Maduka Okoye made a surprise appearance at the Formula 1 British Grand Prix, presenting the Pirelli Pole Position Award to young Italian driver Kimi Antonelli. Okoye, a Udinese...

item.title: Harry Styles Honors One Direction Bandmates During Record-Breaking Wembley Residency
item.description: Harry Styles paid heartfelt tribute to his former One Direction bandmates during his final Wembley show, marking the end of his London residency for the 'Together, Together' tour. The 32-year-old sing...

item.title: Raiders' Tamale seeks confidence boost after benching, with Kris offering support
item.description: Savelio Tamale, the Canberra Raiders' 21-year-old winger, is grappling with a confidence crisis following a brutal benching during a crucial NRL match. Coach Ricky Stuart's post-game encouragement was...

item.title: Nigel Farage's financial controversies and political allies
item.description: The article details Nigel Farage's financial struggles and the controversies surrounding his funding sources. It highlights allegations that Farage received substantial gifts from questionable donors,...

item.title: New HRNS Leadership Offers Hope for Coffee Farmers Amid Sector Challenges
item.description: Coffee farmers across the region are expressing renewed optimism following the appointment of new leadership at the Horticultural Crops Regulatory and Support Services (HRNS). The coffee industry has ...

item.title: Steve's Music Store Closes After 60 Years in Montreal
item.description: Steve's Music, a Montreal music institution with over six decades of history, is set to close its doors after serving the city's music community for more than 60 years. Founded by Steve Kirman in 1965...

item.title: Haaland scores twice as Norway defeat Brazil to reach first-ever World Cup quarter-final
item.description: Norway booked a historic place in the quarter-finals of the 2026 FIFA World Cup after defeating Brazil 2-1 in the Round of 16, with Erling Haaland scoring both goals in the closing stages of the match...

item.title: Political commentator criticizes Dr. Oz's explanation of health insurance during Fox News interview
item.description: A recent Fox News interview featuring Dr. Mehmet Oz, administrator of the Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services (CMS) under the Trump administration, sparked criticism after he discussed alleged ...

item.title: Viral TikTok video of 45-year-old woman offering ₦20 million for marriage fuels discussion on social pressure and single women in Nigeria
item.description: A 45-year-old TikTok user identified as Auroraaligh has gone viral after posting an emotional video in which she claimed she would give ₦20 million to any man willing to marry her. In the caption of t...

item.title: EasyJet and Castlelake Reach Agreement on Potential £5.2 Billion Takeover Amid Regulatory Challenges
item.description: EasyJet, the UK-based low-cost airline, has reached an agreement in principle with US investment firm Castlelake regarding a potential takeover offer valued at approximately £5.2 billion. This follows...

item.title: Gold price rises above $4,180 as US rate outlook shifts
item.description: Gold prices surged past $4,180 after disappointing US jobs data prompted investors to reassess expectations for further interest rate hikes. The US economy added only 57,000 jobs in June, far below th...

item.title: Kenyan President Ruto Challenges Gachagua Over 2022 Mt Kenya Vote Claims
item.description: The article highlights key political developments in Kenya, focusing on President William Ruto's public rebuttal to former deputy president Rigathi Gachagua's claims that Ruto single-handedly secured ...

item.title: British Mountaineer Attempts 16-Hour Kilimanjaro Ascent Record
item.description: British national John Evance is set to attempt a record-breaking 16-hour ascent and descent of Mount Kilimanjaro on 7 July 2026, starting from Mabungo village. His route involves cycling to Marangu Mt...

item.title: Tazara Railway Marathon Sees 300 Runners
item.description: The Tazara Railway Marathon, held on July 5, 2026, attracted approximately 300 athletes, marking another successful edition of the event that has become a regional athletics fixture. The marathon, whi...

item.title: California woman dies after alligator attack in Florida
item.description: A 31-year-old Sacramento woman, Brittany Clark, died after being attacked by an alligator in Florida on June 28, 2026. The incident occurred during a hike with her boyfriend and a friend near Orlando,...
